**Note:** This doc is intentionally separate from `qa-report-2026-03-12.md` to avoid merge conflicts with the child PRs.

## PR #171 тАФ Fix hit log #N slot + raw team ID for orphaned saves

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-bug-a-j` тЖТ `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug A (hit log shows `#N` slot) ┬╖ Bug J (orphaned save shows raw team ID)  
**Changed files:** 5 ┬╖ **+125 / тИТ123** (mostly test cleanup)  
**Status:** ЁЯОЙ **MERGED** into `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`

### CI

| Check                       | Result                                     |
| --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| lint                        | тЬЕ Pass                                    |
| build                       | тЬЕ Pass                                    |
| E2E chromium shards 1тАУ3     | тЬЕ Pass (shard 3 confirmed; 1тАУ2 completed) |
| E2E webkit shards 1тАУ3       | тЬЕ Pass                                    |
| Update snapshots (chromium) | тЬЕ Pass                                    |

### File-by-file review

**`src/features/gameplay/context/index.tsx`** (+2 lines)  
Added `batterName?: string` to `PlayLogEntry` тАФ optional, backward-compatible.  
JSDoc explains the `#N` fallback clearly. тЬЕ No concerns.

**`src/features/gameplay/context/hitBall.ts`** (+16 lines)  
`processConfirmedHit` now resolves batter display name at hit time:

1. `playerOverrides[team][playerId]?.nickname?.trim()` (custom team nickname)
2. `generateRoster(base.teams[battingTeam]).batters.find(p => p.id === playerId)?.name` (stock team)
3. `undefined` тЖТ falls back to `#N` in UI

Both paths guard `playerId` being absent. Spread `...(batterName ? { batterName } : {})` keeps entries compact.  
_Non-blocking observation:_ `generateRoster` generates all 9 batters to look up one name on each stock-team hit. It's I/O-free and fast; acceptable for now. тЬЕ No blocking concerns.

**`src/features/gameplay/components/HitLog/index.tsx`** (+3 / тИТ10 lines)  
Removes `useCustomTeams` async hook and `resolveTeamLabel` entirely. Team name now comes from `teamLabels[entry.team]` тАФ pre-resolved at game-start, so deleted-team saves always show the original name. Renders `entry.batterName ?? \`#${entry.batterNum}\`` cleanly. тЬЕ Correct.

**`src/features/gameplay/components/HitLog/hitLog.test.tsx`** (net rewrite тАФ simpler)  
Removes 50-line `vi.mock("@shared/hooks/useCustomTeams", ...)` block (no longer needed).  
Replaces hand-rolled `makeCtx` with `makeContextValue` from `@test/testHelpers` тАФ matches codebase convention.  
Adds three focused tests:

- `batterName` renders when present; `#N` absent
- `#N` fallback when `batterName` missing
- `teamLabels` used for orphaned-team saves (raw ID never appears)

тЬЕ All three tests verify the acceptance criteria.

### Acceptance criteria

| Criterion                                                              | Met? |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---- |
| Hit log entries show batter name (e.g. `тЦ▓3 тАФ Roberto Martinez`)        | тЬЕ   |
| Backward compat: older saves without `batterName` fall back to `#N`    | тЬЕ   |
| Loading a save for a deleted team shows original team name, not raw ID | тЬЕ   |

### Verdict

тЬЕ **Ready to merge.** Implementation is correct, surgical, and well-tested. No blocking issues.

## PR #172 тАФ Fix Resume button after FINAL + suppress updateProgress error

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-game-over-resume-issue` тЖТ `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug C (Resume button persists after FINAL) ┬╖ Bug 3 (redundant `updateProgress` console error)  
**Changed files:** 8 ┬╖ **+176 / тИТ59**  
**Status:** ЁЯОЙ **MERGED** into `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`

### Changed files

| File                                                       | Change summary                                                                                                                                  |
| ---------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/storage/types.ts`                                     | Added `onGameOver: () => void` to `AppShellOutletContext`                                                                                       |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/AppShell/index.tsx`      | Added `handleGameOver: () => setHasActiveSession(false)`, exposed on outlet context                                                             |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/Game/GameInner.tsx`      | Accepts `onGameOver?: () => void` prop; fires via `useEffect` with `gameOverFiredRef` guard (fires once per game, resets on `gameOver тЖТ false`) |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/Game/index.tsx`          | Threads `onGameOver` prop through to `GameInner`                                                                                                |
| `src/features/gameplay/pages/GamePage/index.tsx`           | Destructures `onGameOver` from outlet context, passes to `<Game>`                                                                               |
| `src/features/saves/hooks/useRxdbGameSync.ts`              | New optional `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoad = false` param; stored in always-current ref; skips `updateProgress` when flag is set                       |
| `src/features/gameplay/components/Game/GameInner.test.tsx` | +2 tests: fires once on `falseтЖТtrue` transition; fires exactly once on repeated `true` renders                                                  |
| `src/features/saves/hooks/useRxdbGameSync.test.tsx`        | Tests for new `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoad` param path                                                                                                |

### Review notes

- `gameOverFiredRef` ref pattern correctly prevents double-firing and resets for the next game. тЬЕ
- `wasAlreadyFinalOnLoadRef.current` is updated on every render to handle mid-session save swaps (FINAL тЖТ in-progress). тЬЕ
- `onGameOver` is optional (`?`) тАФ existing callers without this context (e.g., tests) are unaffected. тЬЕ
- `saveStore.ts` is intentionally **not** changed here (moved to PR #173 to avoid file-ownership conflicts). тЬЕ

### Acceptance criteria

| Criterion                                                                | Met? |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---- |
| After game reaches FINAL naturally, home screen Resume button disappears | тЬЕ   |
| After loading a FINAL save and navigating home, no Resume button         | тЬЕ   |
| For an in-progress game, Resume button still appears                     | тЬЕ   |
| No console error when game ends naturally                                | тЬЕ   |
| No console error when loading a FINAL save                               | тЬЕ   |

### Verdict

тЬЕ **Ready to merge.** Clean implementation with correct ref-guard pattern and good test coverage.

## PR #173 тАФ Fix "undefined" leaking in save/team import errors

**Branch:** `copilot/fix-bug-f-and-bug-5` тЖТ `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug F (save import leaks "undefined") ┬╖ Bug 5 (team import leaks "undefined") ┬╖ `updateProgress` silent-resolve guard  
**Changed files:** 4 ┬╖ **+115 / тИТ63**  
**Status:** ЁЯОЙ **MERGED** into `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`

### Changed files

| File                                                              | Change summary                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/features/saves/storage/saveStore.ts`                         | (1) `importRxdbSave`: added `typeof version !== "number"` guard before version comparison тАФ emits clean user-facing message with no raw tokens; (2) `updateProgress`: changed `throw` to silent `return` when doc not found |
| `src/features/saves/storage/saveStore.test.ts`                    | Updated stale test (`updateProgress` unknown-ID now asserts `.resolves`); added test: `{}` import тЖТ error contains "Invalid"/"format", does NOT contain "undefined"/"null"/"NaN"                                            |
| `src/features/customTeams/storage/customTeamExportImport.ts`      | Added `typeof obj["formatVersion"] !== "number"` guard before discriminator checks тАФ handles empty/structurally invalid objects first                                                                                       |
| `src/features/customTeams/storage/customTeamExportImport.test.ts` | Added test: `{}` import тЖТ error contains "Invalid"/"format", does NOT contain "undefined"/"null"/"NaN"                                                                                                                      |

### Review notes

- Guard order is correct: `formatVersion` type-check fires before `type`/`formatVersion` value comparisons, so malformed objects never reach the discriminator path. тЬЕ
- Well-formed-but-wrong bundles (wrong `type`, unsupported `formatVersion`) still produce their specific errors unchanged. тЬЕ
- `updateProgress` silent-resolve is the right behavior: save deleted between game-start and game-over is an expected race, not an error. тЬЕ
- Error messages are user-friendly, contain no raw JS values, and guide the user to the export flow. тЬЕ

### Acceptance criteria

| Criterion                                                                          | Met?                                  |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| Pasting `{}` into save import shows clean message with no "undefined"/"null"/"NaN" | тЬЕ                                    |
| Pasting `{}` into team import shows clean message with no "undefined"/"null"/"NaN" | тЬЕ                                    |
| Valid imports still succeed                                                        | тЬЕ (existing passing tests unchanged) |
| `updateProgress` for a deleted save silently resolves                              | тЬЕ                                    |

### Verdict

тЬЕ **Ready to merge.** Minimal, well-targeted guards with clear user-facing messages and matching tests.

## PR #174 тАФ Fix save delete confirmation + back button navigation

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotfix-bug-b-and-bug-g` тЖТ `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Bugs fixed:** Bug B (save delete has no confirmation) ┬╖ Bug G (back button on player career page goes to wrong route)  
**Status:** ЁЯЯб **Open** тАФ out of Draft; lint failing; E2E failing (root cause identified below)

### Current CI status

| Check        | Result                                                                        |
| ------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| lint         | тЭМ Fail тАФ 4 warnings (fixed in base branch; PR needs rebase onto latest base) |
| build        | тЬЕ Pass                                                                       |
| E2E chromium | тЭМ Fail тАФ `modals.spec.ts:79` and `save-load.spec.ts:83` (see below)          |
| E2E webkit   | тЭМ Fail тАФ same two tests                                                      |

**Root cause of lint failure:** PR #174 is based on the old base SHA (`77f6943`) before two fixes were applied to the base branch in this session: (1) `eslint.config.mjs` logger path corrected to `src/shared/utils/logger.ts`, (2) `useGameHistorySync.ts:255` exhaustive-deps suppressed. Rebasing onto the current base clears all 4 warnings.

**Root cause of E2E failures:** PR #174 wraps `onDelete` in `window.confirm()`, but `e2e/tests/modals.spec.ts:79` (delete-removes-from-list) and `e2e/tests/save-load.spec.ts:83` (export-roundtrip delete step) both click the delete button without accepting the browser dialog. The delete never fires, so the item count never decreases / the row never disappears.

**Fix needed:** Before each delete-button `.click()` in both E2E tests, add `page.once("dialog", (dialog) => dialog.accept())`. See agent prompt in the [Agent prompts](#agent-prompts-for-remaining-e2e-issues) section below.

### Changed files

| File                                                                        | Change summary                                                                                                                               |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `src/features/saves/components/SaveSlotList/index.tsx`                      | Delete button now calls `window.confirm("Delete this save? This cannot be undone.")` before `onDelete`                                       |
| `src/features/careerStats/pages/PlayerCareerPage/index.tsx`                 | Back button now navigates to `/stats?team=${encodeURIComponent(teamParam)}` when `teamParam` present, else `/stats` тАФ uses `useSearchParams` |
| `src/features/saves/components/SaveSlotList/SaveSlotList.test.tsx`          | Added `window.confirm` spy tests                                                                                                             |
| `src/features/saves/components/SavesModal/SavesModal.test.tsx`              | Updated for confirm stub                                                                                                                     |
| `src/features/saves/pages/SavesPage/SavesPage.test.tsx`                     | Added `vi.stubGlobal("confirm", ...)` for jsdom                                                                                              |
| `src/features/careerStats/pages/PlayerCareerPage/PlayerCareerPage.test.tsx` | Added back-button tests with/without `teamParam`                                                                                             |

### Review notes

The core logic changes are small and correct:

- `window.confirm` guard in `SaveSlotList` matches the team-deletion pattern already used elsewhere. тЬЕ
- `navigate(teamParam ? \`/stats?team=...\` : "/stats")`replaces`navigate(-1)` correctly. тЬЕ
- `encodeURIComponent(teamParam)` is appropriate for the URL value. тЬЕ
- jsdom `window.confirm` stub is correctly added to the test files that need it. тЬЕ

### Verdict

тЪая╕П **Needs rebase + E2E fix** тАФ logic is correct; two mechanical blockers remain (see CI status above and agent prompt below).

## PR #176 тАФ Add hardcoded demo teams for new users

**Branch:** `copilot/copilotadd-demo-teams` тЖТ `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`  
**Feature:** New-1 тАФ two starter teams seeded on first launch so brand-new users can play immediately  
**Status:** ЁЯЯб **Open** тАФ review comments addressed; CI running on updated head  
**Changed files:** 4 (including `e2e/utils/helpers.ts`)

### Current CI status

| Check     | Result                                                           |
| --------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| lint      | ЁЯФД Queued (new head `c64f02c` rebased on latest base)            |
| build     | ЁЯФД In progress                                                   |
| E2E       | ЁЯФД Running (webkit iphone-15-pro-max shards were failing before) |
| Snapshots | ЁЯФД Running                                                       |

### Changes since last review (commit `c64f02c`)

The review-fix commit addressed all reviewer comments from the Copilot automated review:

| Reviewer comment                                                           | Resolution                                                                                                                             |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `_seedAttempted` set before DB work тАФ transient failure suppresses retry   | Replaced with module-level in-flight Promise (`_seedPromise`) that auto-clears on rejection, allowing retry on next mount              |
| `DEMO_SEED_DONE_KEY` set even when all inserts fail                        | Flag is now only written after at least one successful insert (or a known duplicate-key graceful skip); non-duplicate errors propagate |
| `listCustomTeams` excludes archived teams тАФ archived-only installs re-seed | Changed to `listCustomTeams({ includeArchived: true })`                                                                                |
| `ensureDemoSeedSuppressed` init script has no try/catch                    | `localStorage.setItem` now wrapped in `try { тАж } catch { /* ignore */ }` inside `addInitScript`                                        |
| No unit tests for `useSeedDemoTeams`                                       | Added `useSeedDemoTeams.test.ts` with 9 unit tests covering skip, seed, flag, dedup, retry, and error paths                            |
| Comment in `demoTeams.ts` incorrectly stated "no ID"                       | Updated to: "IDs are assigned when converting to TeamPlayer (e.g. in useSeedDemoTeams)"                                                |

### Verdict

ЁЯЯб **Awaiting CI** тАФ implementation now addresses all review comments. Waiting for webkit E2E results on the new head. If webkit shards still fail, see agent prompt in [Agent prompts](#agent-prompts-for-remaining-e2e-issues).

### Verdict

ЁЯЯб **Awaiting CI** тАФ implementation now addresses all review comments. Waiting for webkit E2E results on the new head. If webkit shards still fail, see agent prompt in [Agent prompts](#agent-prompts-for-remaining-e2e-issues).

## E2E failure root-cause analysis

### PR #174 тАФ delete-confirmation tests (chromium + webkit)

**Failing tests:**

| Test                                                                          | File                          | Line |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------- | ---- |
| `Saves modal тА║ delete button removes a save from the list`                    | `e2e/tests/modals.spec.ts`    | 79   |
| `Save / Load тА║ export roundtrip: exported save can be re-imported and loaded` | `e2e/tests/save-load.spec.ts` | 83   |

**Root cause:** PR #174 adds `window.confirm(...)` to the delete button in `SaveSlotList`. Both E2E tests click the delete button and immediately assert the item is gone тАФ without first accepting the browser dialog. The dialog blocks the deletion, so the item count never decreases.

**Fix:** Add `page.once("dialog", (dialog) => dialog.accept())` immediately before each delete `.click()` call in both test files.

---

### PR #176 тАФ webkit iphone-15-pro-max failures (pre-fix)

**Failing tests (21 total, all on `iphone-15-pro-max` project):** All tests in `e2e/tests/career-stats.spec.ts` and `e2e/tests/team-summary.spec.ts`.

**Root cause:** The original `useSeedDemoTeams` hook set the done-flag before any DB work and didn't retry on transient failures. On webkit mobile, IndexedDB init is slower; if the hook ran before DB was ready the flag was set (suppressing future retries) but no teams were created тАФ leaving the app in a broken state for those tests. The `ensureDemoSeedSuppressed` E2E helper also lacked a `try/catch` guard around `localStorage.setItem`, which can throw in restricted contexts.

**Status:** Both issues addressed in commit `c64f02c` on PR #176's branch (in-flight Promise pattern + `try/catch` guard). Awaiting CI results on new head.

---

## Agent prompts for remaining E2E issues

Use these prompts to create new sub-branches and PRs targeting `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues` if CI on the child PRs still fails.

### Prompt A тАФ Fix PR #174 E2E delete-confirmation tests

```
You are working on branch `copilot/copilotfix-bug-b-and-bug-g` (PR #174) targeting
`copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`. The branch adds window.confirm() to the save delete
button in SaveSlotList, but two E2E tests click that button without accepting the dialog,
causing them to fail.

Failing tests:
1. e2e/tests/modals.spec.ts:79  тАФ "Saves modal тА║ delete button removes a save from the list"
   Fix: add `page.once("dialog", (dialog) => dialog.accept())` immediately before the
   listItems.first().getByRole("button", { name: /delete save/i }).click() call (~line 102).

2. e2e/tests/save-load.spec.ts:83 тАФ "export roundtrip" (delete step at ~line 113)
   Fix: add `page.once("dialog", (dialog) => dialog.accept())` immediately before the
   manualSaveRow.getByRole("button", { name: /delete save/i }).click() call (~line 113).

Also rebase this branch onto the latest `copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues` base (which now
has the lint fixes so `yarn lint` will pass clean). Then run:
  yarn lint && yarn format:check && yarn test && yarn typecheck:e2e
All must pass. Use the e2e-test-runner agent to verify E2E inside the Docker container.
```

### Prompt B тАФ Investigate PR #176 webkit E2E failures (if still failing after `c64f02c`)

```
You are working on branch `copilot/copilotadd-demo-teams` (PR #176) targeting
`copilot/handle-quirks-and-issues`. The webkit iphone-15-pro-max project has 21 failing
tests in career-stats.spec.ts and team-summary.spec.ts. A fix was attempted in commit
c64f02c (in-flight Promise pattern + localStorage try/catch in ensureDemoSeedSuppressed).

If those tests are STILL failing after c64f02c:
1. Use the e2e-test-runner agent to run only the webkit (iphone-15-pro-max) shard locally:
     npx playwright test --project=iphone-15-pro-max --shard=2/6 e2e/tests/career-stats.spec.ts
   Capture the actual error messages.
2. Check whether ensureDemoSeedSuppressed() is actually being called before each of the
   failing tests (look at helpers.ts loadFixture and startGameViaPlayBall helpers).
3. If the issue is that demo teams are still being seeded despite the localStorage guard,
   verify the guard key (DEMO_SEED_DONE_KEY = "ballgame:demoSeedDone") matches exactly what
   ensureDemoSeedSuppressed writes to localStorage.
4. Fix the root cause, run yarn lint && yarn test && yarn typecheck:e2e, then use the
   e2e-test-runner agent to confirm all webkit shards pass.
```
